1057.issue: [E1057] js-controller 4.0.24 listed as dependency but 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please update dependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/io-package.json).

1090.issue: [E1090] admin dependency missing. admin 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please add to globalDependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/io-package.json).

3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3018.issue: [W3018] Workflow "/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

4038.issue: [S4038] .vscode/settings.json file missing "json.schemas" property. Add schema definitions for better IntelliSense support.

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process issue [[#429] "Migration to ESLint 9 and @iobroker/eslint-config"](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/issues/429)

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

0029.issue: [E0029] Node.js 18 is required as minimum, node.js 20 is recommended. Please change "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '16' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '18' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/package.json).

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 3.7.0 specified. 4.0.0 is required as minimum,  5.1.1 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/package.json)

0037.issue: [W0037] @iobroker/testing 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.2 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/package.json)

0063.issue: [W0063] "@types/sinon-chai, sinon-chai" are included in "@iobroker/testing". Remove from devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/patrickbs96/ioBroker.twinkly/blob/master/package.json)
